title: stelis hammelii
intro: Stelis hammelii, a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, is native to the tropical regions of Central America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis hammelii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to prevent the growth of certain bacteria and viruses. Herbal preparations of Stelis hammelii can be made by infusing the plant's leaves or roots in water or oil, and can be used as a topical treatment or taken internally in moderation.
